overrides.description: Retain every qualified Release 1218 layer, assign Release 1219, and load the evolving-house state substrate
Add compact house state, meaningful event receipts, projection, recap, and migration defaults

preserved_canonical_state: canonical room descriptions, exits, score routines, trophy-case scoring, and object locations remain authoritative
house prose is appended after the original room description rather than replacing it
event receipts cover only meaningful house entry, Attic use, Cellar crossing, return, collection, and disturbance
state axes derive from the real trophy case, rug, trap door, kitchen window, room visits, and return cycle
native save and restore preserve the exact compact state without post-restore repair
Release 1218 room density and every earlier qualified layer remain unchanged
excluded_scope: new house topology or an unreachable Bedroom placeholder
display surfaces, kitchen crafting, storage lockers, visitors, dreams, playback, or multi-run archives
score changes, treasure duplication, automatic puzzle completion, or maintenance chores
universal event logging, transcript dumping, or open-ended house simulation
death-site recovery, armor, Zork Plus, or linked storage
